transcript:
Doctor: Namaste. Kaise hain aap?
Patient: Doctor saab, theek hain. Lekin sar dard rehta hai subah se.
Doctor: Sar dard? Kahan hota hai? Front ya back?
Patient: Dono taraf hota hai, doctor. Kabhi kabhi bahut zyada ho jata hai.
Doctor: Kya aap dawai le rahe hain BP ki?
Patient: Haan, Amlodipine 5mg roz raat ko leta hoon.
Doctor: Aur BP kitna aata hai ghar pe?
Patient: Subah 150/95 hota hai. Shaam ko thoda kam, 140/90.
Doctor: Yeh bahut high hai. Humko 130 se neeche lana hai. Aapki dawai ka dose kam pad raha hai.
Patient: Kya dose badhana padega, doctor?
Doctor: Haan. Main Amlodipine 5mg ko 10mg kar deta hoon. Aur ek aur dawai add karta hoon, Telmisartan 40mg.
Patient: Telmisartan? Yeh kya hai?
Doctor: Yeh ek ARB hai, bahut achhi dawai hai BP ke liye. Isse aapko sar dard bhi kam hoga.
Patient: Koi side effect toh nahi hoga?
Doctor: Kabhi kabhi chakkar aa sakte hain pehle kuch din. Agar ho toh mujhe batana. Aur roz subah khali pet BP check karo aur likho.
Patient: Theek hai, doctor.
Doctor: Aur ek baat, namak kam khao. Aap kitna namak lete ho roz?
Patient: Doctor, mujhe namak bahut pasand hai. Chutney bhi bahut khata hoon.
Doctor: Yeh sab chhodna padega. High BP aur namak ka bahut relation hai. Kam se kam aadha namak karo pehle.
Patient: Theek hai, doctor. Koshish karunga.
Doctor: Aur exercise karte ho?
Patient: Nahi, doctor. Baith ke kaam karta hoon, office mein.
Doctor: Roz 20 minute walk karo. Bahut zaroori hai. Agar BP control nahi hota, hum aur dawai dalenge.
Patient: Done, doctor. Thank you.
Doctor: 3 hafta baad follow-up aana hai. Saath mein blood reports bhi le aana.
Patient: Haan ji, thank you doctor saab.

soap.subjective: Patient presents with headache since morning. Currently on Amlodipine 5mg nocte. Home BP readings: AM 150/95, PM 140/90. Reports high salt intake and sedentary lifestyle.
soap.objective: BP readings consistently elevated above target (130/80). No target organ damage symptoms reported.
soap.assessment: Uncontrolled essential hypertension on current monotherapy. Inadequate BP control with Amlodipine 5mg.
soap.plan: 1. Up-titrate Amlodipine to 10mg. 2. Add Telmisartan 40mg. 3. Dietary salt restriction. 4. Daily 20-min walk. 5. Home BP monitoring daily AM. 6. Follow-up in 3 weeks with blood reports.
